name: ServiceTitan Field Service API
what_it_does: ServiceTitan REST API for field service management platform focused on home services trades. Enables AI agents to manage jobs, dispatch technicians, process customer data, handle invoicing, manage memberships, track marketing campaigns, and integrate service operations into business workflows. ServiceTitan serves HVAC, plumbing, electrical, and other home service businesses.
use_cases: Managing service jobs and dispatch from home service automation agents
Processing customer calls and booking from call handling agents
Tracking technician performance and revenue from operations analytics agents
Integrating ServiceTitan job data with CRM and marketing platforms from integration agents
not_for: Commercial or industrial field service (ServiceTitan is residential home services focused)
General workforce management without trade-specific workflows
Simple invoicing without field service dispatching needs
best_when: A home services business (HVAC, plumbing, electrical) wants AI agents to automate booking, dispatch, invoicing, and marketing integrations within the ServiceTitan platform.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Job invoicing, membership billing, and service agreements have financial implications. Customer personal data including home addresses is collected.

auth.notes: ServiceTitan uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials with tenant-specific tokens. App registration required through ServiceTitan developer portal. Separate credentials per tenant. Scopes available for different resource types.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise pricing per technician per month
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter, Essentials, and Premiere plans per technician; API access included
pricing.notes: Home services vertical SaaS. Developer program with sandbox available. Enterprise pricing varies by business size.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth app; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Customer home addresses and service history — residential location data is sensitive
No public MCP server — REST API with tenant-specific OAuth credentials
App registration requires developer portal approval — plan ahead
Tenant ID required in all API calls — multi-tenant architecture
Home services-specific data model (jobs, forms, pricebook, memberships) requires domain knowledge
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Customer residential addresses and service history. SOC2. OAuth2 per-tenant. US-only data residency. Developer portal app approval required.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer residential data and service history. SOC2. OAuth2 per-tenant. US-only.
